record.comment: Former entry deleted; re-written to break span of USC Section(s) - 936 removed to following entry of grouped repeals. Sec. 936 repealed by Pub. L. 115?141, div. U, title IV, sec. 401(d)(1)(C), Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1206.
Sec. 936 repealed by Pub. L. 115?141, div. U, title IV, sec. 401(d)(1)(C), Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1206 - added to this entry; removed from previous entry.
